subject: Excel freezes when filtering large worksheet
description: Workbook ~50k rows; applying filter hangs Excel for minutes; user fears data loss.

ts_steps.title: Save copy
ts_steps.action: Save As new filename before experiments.

ts_steps.title: Replace whole-column refs
ts_steps.action: Change A:A style refs to bounded ranges or Table columns.

ts_steps.title: Conditional formatting trim
ts_steps.action: Manage Rules — scope to data rows only.

ts_steps.title: Online Repair
ts_steps.action: Settings → Apps → Microsoft 365 → Modify → Online Repair.

ts_steps.title: Power Query suggestion
ts_steps.action: For huge data suggest Data Model instead of sheet grid.

internal_information: Volatile formulas, whole-column formats, GPU interaction with grid.
